source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH StageFundings AS (
SELECT 
Project,
PaymentAmount,
PaymentDate AS FundedDate,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Project, PaymentAmount ORDER BY PaymentDate) AS rn
FROM ODS.ERP_AR_PAYMENT
WHERE Type LIKE 'Prepayment%' AND Description_2 = 'Stage Funding' --AND Project = 'BR1096835'
),
RankedRefunds AS (
SELECT 
Project,
CASE WHEN PaymentAmount<0 THEN -1 * PaymentAmount ELSE PaymentAmount END AS RefundAmount,
PaymentDate AS RefundDate,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Project, PaymentAmount ORDER BY PaymentDate) AS rn
FROM ODS.ERP_AR_PAYMENT
WHERE (Type LIKE 'Voided%' OR Type LIKE '%Refund%') --AND (Description_2 LIKE '%Voided%' OR Description_2 LIKE '%Refund%') --
--AND Project = 'BR1096835'
),
FinalStageFunding AS (
SELECT 
LTRIM(RTRIM(sf.Project)) as Project,
SUM(sf.PaymentAmount) - SUM(COALESCE(vr.RefundAmount, 0)) AS FinalStageFundedAmount,
MIN(sf.FundedDate) AS FundedDate
FROM StageFundings sf
LEFT JOIN RankedRefunds vr 
ON LTRIM(RTRIM(sf.Project)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(vr.Project)) AND sf.PaymentAmount = vr.RefundAmount AND vr.RefundDate > sf.FundedDate AND sf.rn = vr.rn
--where sf.Project='MC74805FG'
GROUP BY sf.Project
)
--Select * from FinalStageFunding
SELECT 
B.Division_MKTG AS Division,
J.ContractID,
CAST(J.ContractDate AS DATE) AS ContractDate,
F.UNI_FinanceCompany AS FinanceCompany,
F.FinanceCompany AS FinanceCompany_Src,
ISNULL(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt] > 0 AND J.Division NOT IN ('MXH','CTA') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END, 0)
- ISNULL(CASE WHEN JS.UNI_JobStatusCategory IN ('Bank Turn Down','Cancelled') THEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt] > 0 AND J.Division NOT IN ('MXH','CTA') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END, 0) AS NetSales,
P.Project AS ProjectID,
P.FinalStageFundedAmount AS StageFundedAmount,
JS.UNI_JobStatus AS JobStatus,
P.FundedDate AS StageFundingDate,
B.UNI_Market as LP_Market,
B.BranchID as LP_BranchID,
CAST(EOMONTH(DATEADD(m,-1,GETDATE())) as DATE) as SnapshotDate
FROM EDW.FACT_JOB J
LEFT JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN B ON B.BranchID = J.ProductionBranchID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.JobStatusID = JS.JobStatusID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_FINANCE_COMPANY F ON J.FinanceCompanyID = F.FinanceCompanyID
LEFT JOIN FinalStageFunding P 
    ON CASE 
           WHEN RIGHT(LTRIM(RTRIM(P.Project)), 2) = '.R' 
                THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(P.Project)), LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(P.Project))) - 2)  -- strip ".R"
           ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(P.Project))
       END = J.ContractID
WHERE YEAR(J.ContractDate) >= 2025 --and J.ContractID='PB35194'
and CAST(J.ContractDate AS DATE)<=CAST(EOMONTH(DATEADD(m,-1,GETDATE())) as DATE)
